文宣有彩色、有黑白！

Dear celebrities,

I'm sorry to be the one who break this to you, but we do not care what you think, not even a slightest particle of an imaginary thing.

If this surprises you, we can understand. Let's face it, we played an important role of your delusion.

We watch the comedies you directed and produced again and again on TV and we still manage to get a laugh from them. We, together, spent millions of dollars on the tickets of the movies you starred in. Impressively, we managed to remember the lines and plots in your movies faster than scientists would believe.

And after all that fame and the six figure income in your fat bank account, you might come to believe that we would care what you think.

But the fact is, we do not.

Maybe your family do. But we don't, not even a little.

I go to watch a Jackie Chan action movie because no other action actors can do better stunts than him. But watching him virtual signalling on social media and support the HK police? Hardly an event I'd even care to see in my lifetime.

And here's to you, all celebrities who joined the herd of sheeps on the pro-police assembly on 20/7, you all made great contributions to popular culture in the past. But as political philosophers you all leave a lot to be desired. You called the people who joined the anti-extradition bill rally "violent criminals" and you think we all should be "patriotic" like you. Just how long on a private jet must one travel to reach that level of narcissism?

This may rock your glittery world, but we don’t care whether or not you support the police and Carrie Lam. Why would we care who you support?

On the one hand, we should find all of this hilarious; but on the other, it’s actually deeply offensive: It’s offensive that you confuse our consumption of your products for blind faith and we should think like you.

Which is why it’s important that I take this moment to offer each and every one of you egotistic celebs a free ride back down to Planet Earth.

We want to enjoy what you do, singing, dancing, acting and producing movies. Those are wonderful gifts you all have. Those talents should be the things that you take pride in as you enrich our world with your talent.

But when you go on an ignorant, political rant with shallow standpoints without valid evidence to support, call those who don't think like you "rioters" and "criminals" in the media. What the hell, some of those people are your fans!

You cross the line, you lose touch with reality.
You became merely a tool of the CCP regime.
Who wants to a fan of that?!
